channel.title: GameDev - Tag - Intisar Bin Naim

item.title: Tetris Drift
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Tetris Drift is a Tetris 🧱 clone. This game was made for learning purposes along with these other clones – Crashy FO Arrogant Invader Screenshots Download Tetris Drift

item.title: Arrogant Invader
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Arrogant Invader is my own version of the game Space Invaders 👾 This game was made for learning purposes along with these other clones – Tetris Drift Crashy FO. Screenshots Download Arrogant Invader v1.0.0

item.title: Crahy FO
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Crashy FO is a Flappy Bird clone where you play as FO the UFO 🛸 instead of Faby the bird. I made this game for learning purposes along with these other clones – Tetris Drift Arrogant Invader Screenshots Download Crashy FO v1.0.0

item.title: 2D Platformer Project (03) - Game Development Is Hard…or Is It?
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Description “It’s been some time since I uploaded the last devlog. I have been busy with my studies and I didn’t have much time to work on my game. But I was still able to get some work done. In this video, I talked about what I did in the last one month and how overwhelmed I felt at some point.” Video

item.title: 2D Platformer Project (02) - Identity Crisis
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Description “Welcome to the second devlog of my first indie game.” Video

item.title: 2D Platformer Project (01) - Setting Up Player Movement
item.author: Intisar Bin Naim
item.description: Description “Finally I have mustered up the courage to start working on my own game.” Video
